title.en: The Dark Sanctuary, there are many, many such s...

content.en:
The Dark Sanctuary, there are many, many such sinful domain ancestors.

Ye Tian went to the Dark Sacred Domain, spent a little time, captured a large number of evil domain ancestors, sealed them in Ye Tian's inner world, and then gave them the ancestral endowment, copied their bodies, left a mark on the replication talent, and then recovered the ancestral endowment.

This is also one of the abilities to copy talents.

It's just that Ye Tian gave some of his talents to his relatives, and it is naturally impossible to take them back.

Therefore, this kind of retraction of talent is also the first time to do it.

In this way, Ye Tian gave almost all his talents and took them back.

And in this way, he can replicate the bodies of many people, each of which has one or two ancestral endowments.

this day.

Ye Tian descended to the Battle Ancestral Realm, at the gate of the Temple of Time.

Now that Ye Tian, who has killed the Peerless Domain Ancestor, his status in the Battle Gate has risen greatly, which is equivalent to a Peerless Domain Ancestor.

Therefore, he ordered the two domain ancestors stationed in the Temple of Time to leave, and in the next few years, he would personally guard the Temple of Time.

For Ye Tian's order, they didn't dare to disobey it, and they did it one after another.

Entrance to the Temple of Time.

Ye Tian blocked this place, and immediately copied a domain ancestor body.

This domain ancestor body has a space ancestral endowment, so after this body enters the realm of time, it specializes in cultivating the Void Slashing Ancestor Technique and the Void Escape Ancestor Technique, and cultivates until it is about to be assimilated before coming out.

"Let's go inside!"

Ye Tian's replica body stepped into the realm of time, and the energy consumption required for the operation of the realm of time was taken care of by Ye Tian, and a large number of various energy treasures were poured into the realm of time to supply the operation of the realm of time.

Rumble!!!!!

As soon as the copy body entered the realm of time, it began to cultivate, and constantly comprehended the Void Slashing Ancestral Technique and the Void Escape Ancestral Technique.

I don't know how many billions of years have passed, Ye Tian's replica body has been eroded by time by almost half, and then he retreated.

Otherwise, the copy body will not come out, and the realm of time will be isolated from the outside world, and there will be no way to bring out the perception.

As soon as the copy body came out, countless feelings emerged.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian has a deeper understanding of the Void Slash Ancestral Technique and the Void Escape Ancestral Technique, in fact, the ontology has only passed for a moment here, but it can greatly improve the realm of the Void Slash Ancestral Technique and the Void Escape Ancestral Technique, which is too cost-effective.

However, even after countless billions of years of penance in the realm of time, it was not so easy for the ancestral technique to ascend to the Dacheng realm, let alone to the consummation realm.

Moreover, his body in the realm of time did not have the characteristics of evolution, so there was no way to use the characteristics of evolution to deduce the ancestral technique, and the speed of cultivation was naturally extremely slow, and he could only rely on endless years to accumulate.

"It's okay, just condense another replica body!"

Ye Tian manipulated time, constantly speeding up time, and only a while had passed in the outside world, Ye Tian had spent 10,000 years, and his copying ability could be used again.

Subsequently, Ye Tian copied another body and entered the realm of time.

In this way, one after another, the copied bodies entered the realm of time, and comprehended the Void Slash Holy Technique and the Void Escape Holy Technique.

Ten replica bodies!

Hundred replica bodies!

It took hundreds of replica bodies to cultivate the Void Slash and Void Escape Ancestral Techniques to the consummation realm.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to cultivate other ancestral techniques.

Once the copied bodies were not enough, he would go and grab some more domain ancestors, give them the ancestral endowments, copy their bodies again, and then kill them.

Using this method, one of Ye Tian's ancestral skills reached the realm of perfection.

------------------

"Hundreds of thousands of domain ancestors!"

During this time, Ye Tian captured hundreds of thousands of domain ancestors, and the fate of these domain ancestors was naturally death.

There is no shortage of domain ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain, hundreds of thousands of domain ancestors can't make any waves in the Dark Holy Domain, and he killed all the domain ancestors who should be killed, so he didn't attract the attention of others.

Hundreds of thousands of copies of the body and hundreds of thousands of times into the realm of time.

Although not much time has passed in the outside world, Ye Tian has indeed spent an infinite amount of time in the realm of time, even in his state of mind, he almost collapsed.

When he was the former Supreme Domain Ancestor, he didn't dare to do so much, and his soul would definitely not be able to withstand such a long period of uninterrupted enlightenment.

But now that the Holy Soul is extremely powerful, and his state of mind is naturally very high, he dares to do this.

But now, Ye Tian is also extremely tired.

Fortunately, his efforts were not in vain, and almost all of his ancestral skills were cultivated by him to the consummation realm.

Now, his strength has risen to a terrifying level.

If he dealt with a peerless domain ancestor like Jinchen Holy Ancestor, he could kill the other party with just a few moves.

"I can't continue to cultivate in the future, I need to travel through the Dark Sanctuary for thousands of years, play around, and relieve my state of mind!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, in the following years, Ye Tian had been eating, drinking, and having fun, completely forgetting his cultivation and forgetting everything.

Sometimes, he even professes his memory and strength, and lives as an ordinary god.

In this way, tens of millions of years have passed.

The Dark Sanctuary, in a small city.

Ye Tian stood in a small courtyard, his heart was quiet.

At this time, he unsealed his memory, and his heart was no longer impetuous, nor did he have any resistance to cultivation.

"I've finally recovered, I can't do that next time, and the realm of time is useless to me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He stepped out and left here, and soon returned to the Battle Ancestor Realm.

Then, he left an incarnation in Zhan Zu, as for the copy body, it will not stay here, and he will need to use the copy body to derive the body control again and again in his future cultivation, so it is inconvenient to stay here.

And his incarnation is comparable to the combat power of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, although it may not be comparable to the incarnation of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor, but it is definitely not too weak.

After Ye Tian returned to the Xuanxu Saint Realm, he continued to control his body.

He only controls the body dozens of times, and he is still far from 365 times the body control, only by completely controlling the body 365 times, can he break the limit of the invincible domain body, complete an invincible domain transformation, and after nine transformations, he will evolve to the level of the upper level of the invincible domain body.

In a flash, billions of years have passed.

After such a long period of penance, copying the body's countless evolutions, it is only then that the body control has been raised to an extremely high level.

And he is only one step away from 365 times body control!
